2026-04-19.title: Fight Gone Bad
2026-04-19.description:
3 rounds, 1 minute at each station:
Wall Balls (20/14)
Sumo Deadlift High Pull (75/55)
Box Jumps (20")
Push Press (75/55)
Row (calories)
Rest 1 minute between rounds.
Score = total reps/calories.

2026-04-18.title: EMOM 10
2026-04-18.description:
EMOM 10 minutes:
10 Burpees
Rest in remaining time.

2026-04-16.title: Tabata Squats
2026-04-16.description:
Tabata Air Squats
8 rounds: 20s work / 10s rest.
Score = lowest rep count.
